production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
CANON = ["intake", "er", "relation_graph", "features", "model_score", "queue"]
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T1A",
    "stages": list(CANON),
    "label_space": "needs_review",
    "auto_fraud": False,
}
# DEFECTO: compara contra el orden invertido
meets = record["stages"] == list(CANON) and record["label_space"] == "needs_review" and record["auto_fraud"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_STAGE_ORDER"
print("S39-T1-A", status)

def decide(packet: dict):
    # DEFECTO: siempre continúa
    return "CONTINUE", 1

    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2A",
    "score": 0.81,
    "evidence": ["shared_phone_synth"],
    "graph_path": ["E1", "ph:900", "E2"],
    "uncertainty": "in_distribution",
}

exercises.code:
checklist = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T3A",
    "pii_minimized": True,
    "rbac": True,
    "secrets_in_repo": False,
    "slice_metrics": True,
    "input_limits": True,
}
# DEFECTO: no niega secrets_in_repo
meets = all([
    checklist["pii_minimized"],
    checklist["rbac"],
    not checklist["secrets_in_repo"],
    checklist["slice_metrics"],
    checklist["input_limits"],
])
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_RELEASE"
print("S39-T3-A", status)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: label_space triage N3: needs_review / prioridad de cola.
CF-3 y regresión S27–S39: se documentan; PASS lo califica otra lane.
Evidence packet: evidencia y path además del score.
Incidente grave: human_only / rollback a artefacto previo.
Breaking change graph_schema: bump major, owner contactable y revalidación.
